name: batchor-agent-tools
description: Repo-local agent helpers for batchor contributors.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local MCP helpers for batchor development
interface.longDescription: Adds a lightweight repo-aware MCP server that returns the batchor project guide, validation commands, and document index so coding agents can orient quickly without re-deriving repo conventions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the batchor repo MCP helpers to inspect the project guide, validation commands, and design-doc entry points before editing.
